insight: Zemora Voidbringer may slightly favor Player 1 because P1 can execute DD/DC opening while P2 cannot commit to Conduits earlier without sacrificing too much economy, though P2 can still go turn 1 Conduit if the Zemora is essential.
author: totally_not_fbi, p0lari, steel0229e
context: Debate on P1/P2 balance in Zemora sets.
